hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
contact_style: split layout — message on left, links on right
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: hero takes 100vh with centered huge typography
bonus_quirk: include a CSS-only dark/light mode toggle switch
